data.description:
Deliberate pause-between-features cleanup from the joe-janitor health pipeline run on 2026-07-07 (baseline 3040aa0cf..67372d018, ~5 days / 396 commits). Two independent verifiers scored the finding pool; two blind proposers converged on every remediation; the maintainer approved each item individually. This epic tracks the approved remediations. Findings dropped/blessed are recorded in `.joe-janitor/report-2026-07-07.md` and `.joe-janitor/known-fine.md`.

## Context
- Overall health sound but decaying at the margins: substantial-restructure share fell 26%->18% while volume rose (+10% LOC) — optionality spent faster than bought back. Growth concentrated in `llm/plan_review/*` and `_engine/rebar_reconciler/*`.
- Genuine improvements this window (acknowledged): config.py 1310->938, reconcile.py 1485->1182, outbound_differ.py 1277->691.

## Success Criteria
- Every child ticket below is closed (each addresses one approved finding with its own acceptance criteria).
- `.joe-janitor/known-fine.md` blessings (O4, DE4, O7) remain accurate.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] A1 (editor XSS) fixed
- [ ] S1 (allowlist growth ratchet) landed
- [ ] S3 (__init__.py facade thinned)
- [ ] S6+S7 (oversized reconciler functions extracted)
- [ ] F14 (attestation CWD minimal fix)
- [ ] SC1 (completion-gate public context contract)
- [ ] SC2 (public detector_matches)
- [ ] DE3 (dead _dispatch_mutation removed)
- [ ] DOC (bash-migration.md deleted + doc fixes + version-sync guard)
- [ ] git-adapter (SC5/SC6/SC7) central reconciler git seam
- [ ] DE2 (dead _call_with_backoff decoy removed)
- [ ] SC4 (invariant detection/remediation split)
- [ ] S9 (TicketQuery adoption)
- [ ] S11 (produce_code_review_verdict decomposed)
- [ ] S10 (replay_events flattened)
- [ ] S2+S12 (at-cap files relieved)
- [ ] Adapter-seam design/ADR + reconciler sub-packaging (S5+O5)
- [ ] epic-3e36 re-create feature finished
- [ ] DE7 deprecated-alias removal (migrate-first, then remove shims)
data.title: Janitor Cleanup 2026-07-07
